CREATE TABLE test_strings (id INT, str CLOB);
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES (1, 'MonetDB Test'), (2, 'Fuzz Testing'), (3, 'Substr Functionality');
SELECT substr(str, 1, 5) FROM test_strings WHERE id = 1;
SELECT substr(str, 3, 4) FROM test_strings WHERE id = 2;
SELECT substr(str, 1, 15) FROM test_strings WHERE id = 3;
SELECT substr(str, 1, 2) FROM test_strings WHERE id = 1 UNION SELECT substr(str, 3, 2) FROM test_strings WHERE id = 2;
SELECT substr((SELECT str FROM test_strings WHERE id = 3), 5, 5) AS extracted_substr;
SELECT substr((SELECT substr(str, 1, 7) FROM test_strings WHERE id = 1), 1, 3) AS nested_substr;
CREATE TABLE more_tests (id INT, name CLOB);
INSERT INTO more_tests VALUES (1, 'Hello World!'), (2, 'SQL Fuzzing');
SELECT substr(a.name, 1, 5) FROM more_tests a JOIN test_strings b ON a.id = b.id WHERE a.id IS NOT NULL;
SELECT substr(a.str, 2, 2) AS part1, substr(a.str, 4, 3) AS part2 FROM test_strings a JOIN more_tests b ON LENGTH(a.str) > 5;
SELECT substr(CAST(NOW() AS TEXT), 1, 10) AS current_date_substr;
SELECT id, substr(str, 1, 10) FROM test_strings WHERE LENGTH(str) > 10 ORDER BY id DESC;
